The headline at top in large bold distressed navy serif/slab letters reads 'NICE AGENTS'. The central illustration depicts an officer in a dark cap, tactical vest, and uniform kneeling on one knee with his hand on the shoulder of a young boy who looks up at him; the officer's vest and a shoulder patch are labeled 'NICE'. To the left is a tattered American flag on a pole; in the background are a watchtower silhouette, a fence or wall, mountains, and a cloudy sky. notable_text: I am so proud of our ICE Patriots! ... They are Great American Patriots ... Thank you to ICE for the GREAT job you are doing. America very much appreciates it! President DONALD J. TRUMP
description: A graphic reproducing a social media post from Donald J. Trump as a rendered card. White background with a post layout: a circular profile avatar in the top-left showing a face painted in the pattern of a U.S. flag, the bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta/pink verification badge and a black plus/subscription badge, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump' beneath. The body is a block of black sans-serif text reading: 'I am so proud of our ICE Patriots! They were unfairly maligned by the Lunatic Democrats for years, and now, at the Airports, in addition to what they are supposed to be doing, they are helping people with bags, even picking up and cleaning areas. They are so proud to be there! The fact is, they shouldn’t have to do this, but they are rehabbing a fake image given to them by Radical Left Democrat politicians. The Public is loving ICE, so the Democrats, unwittingly, did us a favor, They are Great American Patriots, they just happen to have much larger, and harder, muscles than most, which is what they’re supposed to have. Thank you to ICE for the GREAT job you are doing. America very much appreciates it! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The tweet caption reads: 'Thank you to @ICEgov heroes for the GREAT job you are doing. America very much appreciates it!'

notable_text: Statement by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement - 'began conducting enhanced targeted operations today in Chicago ... keeping potentially dangerous criminal aliens out of our communities.'

Centered at top is the grey translucent circular seal of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (eagle emblem ringed by 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY') above large grey 'ICE' lettering, with a thin dark-red horizontal rule beneath. Below in white serif type is the headline 'Statement by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' followed by the quoted statement: '“U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, along with federal partners, including the FBI, ATF, DEA, CBP and the U.S. Marshals Service, began conducting enhanced targeted operations today in Chicago to enforce U.S. immigration law and preserve public safety and national security by keeping potentially dangerous criminal aliens out of our communities.”'

notable_text: When President Xi very elegantly referred to the United States as perhaps being a declining nation... President Xi congratulated me on so many tremendous successes in such a short period of time. ... now, the United States is the hottest Nation anywhere in the world.
description: A screenshot of a Truth Social or X post by 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump'. The profile picture is Trump's face with an American flag stars-and-stripes overlay; a magenta verified checkmark and a black '+' subscription badge are beside the name. The image is a white card with black sans-serif body text, and one phrase is highlighted in bright yellow marker style: 'President Xi congratulated me on so many tremendous successes in such a short period of time.' The full verbatim text reads: 'When President Xi very elegantly referred to the United States as perhaps being a declining nation, he was referring to the tremendous damage we suffered during the four years of Sleepy Joe Biden and the Biden Administration, and on that score, he was 100% correct. Our Country suffered immeasurably with open borders, high taxes, transgender for everybody, men in women's sports, DEI, horrible trade deals, rampant crime, and so much more! President Xi was not referring to the incredible rise that the United States has displayed to the world during the 16 spectacular months of the Trump Administration, which includes all-time high stock markets and 401K's, military victory and thriving relationship in Venezuela, the military decimation of Iran (to be continued!) - Strongest military on earth by far, economic powerhouse again, with a record 18 trillion dollars being invested into the United States by others, best U.S. job market in history, with more people working in the United States right now than ever before, ending country destroying DEI, and so many other things that it would be impossible to readily list. In fact, President Xi congratulated me on so many tremendous successes in such a short period of time. Two years ago, we were, in fact, a Nation in decline. On that, I fully agree with President Xi! But now, the United States is the hottest Nation anywhere in the world, and hopefully our relationship with China will be stronger and better than ever before!'

notable_text: ENDING MINNESOTA FRAUD. THE DAILY SIGNAL - The Department of Labor launched an investigation into Minnesota's Unemployment Insurance Program.
description: Vertical graphic from the Department of Labor. The upper two-thirds is a desaturated black-and-white photograph of Donald Trump in a dark suit with a red tie and an American flag lapel pin, arms at his sides, looking toward the camera; behind him is a blurred aircraft on a runway. A dark navy-to-black gradient frames the edges. Overlaid in large white serif capitals is the headline 'ENDING MINNESOTA FRAUD.' Below is a white rounded rectangle text box with the logo of 'THE DAILY SIGNAL' (with a circular 'S' mark) and black serif text: 'The Department of Labor launched an investigation into Minnesota's Unemployment Insurance Program. The Labor Department sent a letter to the Minnesota Department of Employment and Economic Development saying that recent reports of fraud, waste, and abuse may compromise the integrity of its Unemployment Insurance Program, which provides temporary financial aid to workers who lose their jobs.' A small DOL eagle seal is at the bottom center. The tweet text references 'welfare fraud being committed by TPS Somalis in Minnesota.'

genre_refs: nostalgic suburban Americana; warm autumnal small-town aesthetic
notable_text: Recapture the Dream
description: Slogan graphic from the Department of Labor. The background is a sun-dappled photograph of a suburban street in autumn: a cream two-story house with a porch, a white picket fence, golden fall foliage on overhanging trees, a mowed lawn and hedges, and a brick path. An American flag hangs from the house. At right, an adult walks hand-in-hand with a small child down the path. A small circular DOL eagle seal is at center. Across the middle in white italic script is the slogan 'Recapture the Dream.' The accompanying tweet states 'The American Dream has been stolen from the American People' by 'decades of failed policies' that 'prioritized foreign labor' and 'offshored our jobs,' and states a commitment under POTUS to 'restore the American Dream for EVERY AMERICAN.'

notable_text: Americans FIRST!; End H-1B abuse; Project Firewall enforcement initiative; TIME
description: A Department of Labor designed slogan-and-news card. The top half is a desaturated blue-toned photograph showing the silhouetted backs of a crowd of workers (several wearing ball caps) facing a large American flag hung on an industrial/hangar-like wall. Across the middle in large white serif type is the slogan 'Americans FIRST!' ('Americans' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold). Below, on a white card framed by a navy border, sits a red 'TIME' magazine logo badge followed by reproduced article text in black serif: 'Companies could face probes into their compliance with the H-1B visa program as part of the Trump Administration's effort to clamp down on the program and force companies to hire more Americans. The Department of Labor announced on Friday that it was launching Project Firewall, an "enforcement initiative" that will investigate employers for potential abuse of the H-1B visa process.' The tweet reads 'End H-1B abuse. Hire Americans FIRST.'

notable_text: '...we must protect our most valuable resource: the American worker. Launching Project Firewall will help us ensure no employers are abusing H-1B visas...' - Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer
description: A minimalist designed quote card consisting of a block of dark serif text on a plain white background, with a thin gray vertical scrollbar visible at the right edge (styled to look like an excerpt or screenshot). The full text reads: 'The Trump Administration is standing by our commitment to end practices that leave Americans in the dust. As we reestablish economic dominance, we must protect our most valuable resource: the American worker. There are no photographs, seals, or decorative elements; the content is text only.

notable_text: Americans FIRST! | THE NATIONAL LAW REVIEW | Project Firewall is the most aggressive H-1B enforcement initiative in more than a decade
description: Designed Department of Labor card. (3) 'Early indications show targeted audits of employers with patterns of offsite placement, wage-level discrepancies, or unusually high H-1B ratios.'

description: Vertical graphic. The lower half is a white inset panel reproducing a 'Bloomberg Law' article excerpt (the Bloomberg Law logo shown as a black tab): the text states the US Labor Department is enforcing temporary-worker rules as the Trump administration raises fees and oversight for employers of visa holders, putting companies on notice to comply or risk being blocked; that attorneys say the initiative, dubbed 'Project Firewall' by Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, marks a posture change for the DOL and other agencies in the immigration ecosystem; and that companies using the H-1B program to recruit foreign workers, such as Amazon, Microsoft, Wal-Mart, and Meta, are expected to see new compliance investigations, with rulebreakers facing fines and disbarment from the specialty-occupation visa program.

Possible Flights Home... Consequences: Immediate deportation... Fines and penalties. A fine of $998 per day... A fine of $1,000 - $5,000... Possible imprisonment... Barred from returning.
description: Two-panel red, white, and blue DHS infographic. The top header band is blue with bold white text: 'MESSAGE TO ILLEGAL ALIENS:' in a smaller line over 'A WARNING TO SELF-DEPORT' in large type. The upper blue section, headed 'Benefits:', shows a photograph of a hand holding a smartphone displaying the CBP Home app screen, titled 'Departing Traveler' with a map of the U.S. and menu items 'Verify Departure', 'View My Departure', and 'Submit Intent To Depart'. The listed items in white text: 'Self-deportation is safe. Leave on your own terms by picking your departure flight.'; 'Keep money earned in the U.S. If you self-deport as a non-criminal illegal alien.'; 'Future opportunity for legal immigration. If you self-deport using CBP Home instead of being deported by ICE.'; 'Possible Flights Home. You may be eligible to a subsidized flight if you cannot afford to leave.' The lower section has a dark-red background, headed 'Consequences:', listing: 'Immediate deportation. You will be apprehended by DHS with no opportunity to get your affairs in order beforehand.'; 'Fines and penalties. A fine of $998 per day if you received a final order of removal and stayed.'; 'A fine of $1,000 - $5,000 if you fail to self-deport after claiming that you will.'; 'Possible imprisonment. If you fail to self-deport, you may be subject to jail time.'; 'Barred from returning. Prohibited from reentering the U.S. through the legal immigration system.' The circular blue DHS seal appears at bottom-right.

notable_text: Remember Your First Thrill of AMERICAN LIBERTY; SAFEGUARD AMERICANISM; USCIS.GOV/JOIN

The painterly image shows a crowd of people in old-fashioned coats, shawls and hats gathered on the deck of a steamship arriving in New York harbor, with the Statue of Liberty in the misty background and a lifeboat at upper right. The scene is in muted period tones (browns, reds, blues, cream sky). Bold display text at the top, in red, reads 'Remember Your First Thrill of AMERICAN LIBERTY'. A cream banner across the bottom carries, in large blue and red letters, 'SAFEGUARD AMERICANISM' and below it 'USCIS.GOV/JOIN'. The tweet text reads 'Decide what our nation will become.'

notable_text: Blaze media; POLITICS; Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown

Below it is the article's photo: a woman in glasses and a cream blazer seated at a table speaking into a microphone, with the U.S. flag and another flag behind her and a name placard in front. The photo credit reads 'Photo by Anna Moneymaker/Getty Images'. A red section label 'POLITICS' sits beneath, followed by the large black serif headline 'Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown'.

notable_text: AMERICANISM WILL PREVAIL
description: Poster with a tight, low-angle close-up photograph of the Statue of Liberty's head and crown against a deep blue sky. The image is color-graded with a desaturated cool blue cast over the green-grey copper face, while the crown's spikes are tinted vivid red. The statue's face is shown in three-quarter profile looking upward and outward. A small circular Department seal sits centered near the bottom. Across the bottom in large white serif capitals with a subtle glow is the slogan 'AMERICANISM WILL PREVAIL'. There is no other text on the image.

notable_text: Americans FIRST! FOX NEWS - The Department of Labor revealed it has launched at least 175 ongoing investigations targeting potential abuses within the H-1B visa program... The DOL launched Project Firewall in September...
description: Department of Labor slogan graphic combining a photo of Donald Trump with a quoted news excerpt. The background is a darkened photograph of Trump from the chest up against a blurred blue backdrop; he wears a dark navy suit, white shirt, red tie and an American-flag lapel pin, looking off to the side with one hand raised mid-gesture. Overlaid across the lower-middle in a large mixed serif font is the text 'Americans FIRST!' (the word 'Americans' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold roman). Below sits a white rounded rectangle box topped by the dark-blue 'FOX NEWS' logo, containing a news excerpt in black serif: 'The Department of Labor revealed it has launched at least 175 ongoing investigations targeting potential abuses within the H-1B visa program as part of its mission to protect American jobs and ensure only necessary foreign workers are employed in the U.S. The DOL launched Project Firewall in September to ensure that employers prioritize qualified Americans for job positions and do not abuse the H1B visa program, which allows U.S. companies to hire foreign workers in specialty occupations.'

notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement. ICE.gov/LegalCareers. Not a career. A calling.
description: ICE legal-careers recruitment poster. The image is a golden-toned photograph of a bronze Lady Justice statue (blindfolded, holding aloft a set of balance scales) standing in a sunlit interior with blurred shelves and light beams behind her. In the upper-left corner is the U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal beside the wordmark 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' and the URL 'ICE.gov/LegalCareers' in dark blue. Across the lower-left in a serif font, white text reads 'Not a career.' followed by a larger, bolder 'A calling.' The tweet text includes 'hiring bonuses up to $50,000' and 'six-figure salary.'

notable_text: Total Native-Born Employment Level. Biden Administration. Trump Administration (so far). Inauguration. THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
description: White House line chart on a white background. The serif title reads 'Total Native-Born Employment Level' (with 'Employment Level' in italic). A two-item legend uses a navy dot for 'Biden Administration' and a red dot for 'Trump Administration (so far)'. The y-axis is labeled 'Total employment (thousands)' running roughly 129,000 to 134,000; the x-axis spans Nov. 2023 through Nov. 2025 in three-month increments. A dashed vertical gridline near Jan/Feb 2025 is labeled 'Inauguration'. The line is navy for the Biden-era portion (showing a dip and roughly flat values around 130,000-132,000) and switches to red after inauguration, rising to about 133,000 by late 2025. A dark navy footer bar carries 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON'. This is the first of two chart images in the same tweet; the tweet text refers to foreign-born workers and net job growth in 2024.

notable_text: MEXICO; MURDER; ICE in DOVER DELAWARE
description: Graphic on a black background with a faint dark topographic-contour texture. At the top, a small red double-chevron icon precedes the white bold word 'MEXICO'. Centered is a framed booking-style photograph of a middle-aged man with graying hair, a mustache and a short goatee, photographed against a gray wall. Across the lower portion of the photo is a bold bright-red banner with a drop-shadow tab containing the single white all-caps word 'MURDER'. At the bottom is the DHS/ICE seal next to the white 'ICE' wordmark, followed by an italic 'in' and the location 'DOVER DELAWARE'. The palette is high-contrast and dark with condensed sans-serif type. Per the tweet, the man is Rodrigo Mauricio Lopez-Garcia, a Mexican national sentenced to 60 years (suspended to 15) for second-degree murder and weapon possession after re-entering the U.S. following prior removals.

notable_text: American Workers FIRST! THE WESTERN JOURNAL: Trump Admin Launches 175 H-1B Visa Abuse Investigations in 'Project Firewall'. Blaze media: Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown. FOX NEWS: Trump admin reveals over 100 investigations into H-1B abuses as it pledges 'every resource' to protect US jobs.

The upper portion is a dark portrait photograph of Donald Trump (chest-up, dark navy suit, white shirt, red tie, flag lapel pin), lit against shadow. Across the middle in a mixed serif font is the text 'American Workers FIRST!' ('American Workers' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold roman). Below are three torn-paper headline cards, each topped by an outlet logo banner and a headline in black serif: THE WESTERN JOURNAL (tagline 'Equipping Readers with the Truth'), 'Trump Admin Launches 175 H-1B Visa Abuse Investigations in \'Project Firewall\''; Blaze Media, 'Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown'; and a larger FOX NEWS card (blue banner), 'Trump admin reveals over 100 investigations into H-1B abuses as it pledges \'every resource\' to protect US jobs'.

notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST; Total Native-Born Employment Level; Biden Administration vs Trump Administration (so far); Inauguration; THE WHITE HOUSE
description: A White House-branded graphic in portrait format with a dark palette. Centered in very large white serif all-caps is the slogan 'AMERICANS FIRST'. The lower half is an embedded line-chart card on a light background titled 'Total Native-Born Employment Level', with a legend distinguishing 'Biden Administration' (blue line) and 'Trump Administration (so far)' (red line). The x-axis runs Nov. 2023 through Nov. 2025, the y-axis 'Total employment (thousands)' from 129,000 to 134,000; a dashed vertical line labeled 'Inauguration' marks the transition, with the blue Biden line flat and the red Trump line rising afterward. The card is footed with 'THE WHITE HOUSE' and the seal appears at the very bottom.

notable_text: Green cards and visas are a privilege, not a right.
description: A USCIS slogan graphic on a pale blue gradient background watermarked with a faint large 'DEPARTMENT OF ... HOMELAND ...' seal and wreath behind the text. The headline, set in a heavy dark-navy serif font at upper left, reads: 'Green cards and visas are a privilege, not a right.' with the word 'privilege' in bold italic and underlined with a hand-drawn red swoosh. Below the headline are two overlapping specimen identity documents shown as photographs: a U.S. 'PERMANENT RESIDENT' green card (sample bearing name 'TEST V SPECIMEN', USCIS# 000-000-310, Category IR1, Country of Birth Bahamas, Date of Birth 17 AUG 1958, with a Statue of Liberty and flag background and a sample headshot of a man) and a U.S. 'IMMIGRANT VISA' (Issuing Post US Consulate General London, surname TRAVELER, given name HAPPYPERSON, Category IR1, with a sample headshot of a woman and a machine-readable zone reading 'VIUSATRAVELER<<HAPPYPERSON<<...'). The tweet states that 'rigorous security vetting does not end' and that lawbreakers will 'lose your privileges.'

notable_text: PROTECTING AMERICANS; The Charlotte Observer; nearly 200 investigations ... abusing the H-1B visa program as part of Project Firewall
description: Vertical Department of Labor card with a dark navy border. The top two-thirds is a photograph of President Trump standing at a lectern in the U.S. Capitol (House chamber) wearing a navy suit and maroon/purple tie with an American flag lapel pin; behind him Vice President JD Vance (left) is clapping and Speaker Mike Johnson (center) stands, with American flags and columns visible. Centered in large white serif all-caps is the headline 'PROTECTING AMERICANS'. Below, on a white rounded panel, is the masthead of 'The Charlotte Observer' (in a blue blackletter logo), followed by serif body text: 'The Trump Administration is taking decisive action to ensure American job opportunities are not being replaced by cheap foreign labor.' and 'The Labor Department launched nearly 200 investigations into companies suspected of abusing the H-1B visa program as part of Project Firewall, an effort to ensure employers do not unlawfully displace American workers.' The DOL seal appears at the very bottom.

Across the middle in large white serif type (italic 'The Biden' plus bold 'JOB MARKET') is the headline 'The Biden JOB MARKET'. Beneath the chart, two large summary lines read 'NATIVE-BORN WORKERS: -1,319,000' and 'FOREIGN-BORN WORKERS: +1,240,000', with a small source line 'Sources: BLS, Federal Reserve Bank, Fox News.'

notable_text: Americans FIRST! | Daily Mail: Project Firewall, the DOL's new H1B visa program, already has 200 active investigations into US companies with potential violations. Violations range from misleading applicants about pay to offering jobs solely to non-citizens...
description: Graphic from the Department of Labor. The upper portion is a color photograph of Donald Trump in a dark navy suit, light blue shirt, and blue tie with a small American flag lapel pin, standing facing the camera in front of a blurred dark-blue backdrop showing a partial '202_' year numeral and an out-of-focus map graphic. Beneath, a serif headline reads 'Americans FIRST!' ('Americans' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold capitals). Below is a white rounded text card with the Daily Mail logo and the text: 'Project Firewall, the DOL's new H1B visa program, already has 200 active investigations into US companies with potential violations. Violations range from misleading applicants about pay to offering jobs solely to non-citizens. Another issue arises when foreign workers overstay their visas, contributing to the US's immigration woes.' A small embossed seal is at the bottom center.

notable_text: America FIRST! | Bloomberg: No president has ever launched a program quite like Firewall... 'the first time the federal government has sought to broadly enforce H-1B legal standards'... Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who will lead the project, said she will personally certify investigations...
description: A graphic. The top portion is a darkened photograph of Donald Trump in a dark navy suit and red tie raising a clenched fist, standing in front of a blurred dark-green background with Marine One visible at left. Beneath, a large white serif headline reads 'America FIRST!' ('America' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold capitals). Below is a white rounded text card topped by the Bloomberg logo containing the text: 'No president has ever launched a program quite like Firewall, which the Labor Department said could be "the first time the federal government has sought to broadly enforce H-1B legal standards" in the program's 35-year history. Until now, suspected non-compliance has been largely based on worker complaints, investigated on a case-by-case basis. Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who will lead the project, said she will personally certify investigations, which will draw on data and resources from multiple agencies, including the Justice Department, US Citizenship and Immigration Services and others.'

notable_text: ARRESTED BY ICE KNOXVILLE ON FEB. 13, 2025. AGGRAVATED FELON AND RE-ENTRY. WH.GOV
description: White House arrest card on a high-contrast orange-and-black background. A black header bar at top carries the word 'ARRESTED' in large bold orange capitals, with a sub-line in white and orange: 'BY ICE KNOXVILLE ON FEB. 13, 2025'. The center has a booking mugshot photograph of a dark-haired man (the tweet identifies Horacio Mejia-Villegas, a Guatemalan national) framed in a thick black border against a wall. Below, on black highlight bars, bold orange and cream capitals read 'AGGRAVATED FELON AND RE-ENTRY'. At the bottom center is the engraved White House line-drawing emblem above 'WH.GOV'. The tweet lists 'Rape of a child, assault with a weapon, hit and run, domestic violence...' and 'MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN'.

notable_text: Protecting AMERICAN JOBS | Newsweek: Project Firewall marks a turning point in how the United States polices high-skilled immigration... the first time in more than three decades that a U.S. labor secretary has pledged to personally certify investigations into suspected H-1B and Labor Condition Application (LCA) violations.
description: U.S. Department of Labor graphic on a near-black background. The upper portion shows a photograph of President Donald Trump seated at the Resolute Desk in the Oval Office, head bowed as he signs a document; behind him are gold drapes, military service flags (with eagle finials), and a framed historical illustration on the wall. Overlaid in white serif type (italic 'Protecting' above bold 'AMERICAN JOBS') is the text 'Protecting AMERICAN JOBS'. Below is a white rounded-rectangle card styled as a news excerpt with the bold 'Newsweek' wordmark at top, followed by black body text: 'Project Firewall marks a turning point in how the United States polices high-skilled immigration. For the first time, the Labor Department can launch its own investigations into H-1B visa use without waiting for worker complaints, shifting the system from reactive to proactive enforcement. ... Announced last month, Project Firewall represents the first time in more than three decades that a U.S. labor secretary has pledged to personally certify investigations into suspected H-1B and Labor Condition Application (LCA) violations.'

notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST | Rapid Response 47 @RapidResponse47: Since President Trump took office (Jan.-Sep. 2025): 2.57M native-born Americans GAINED employment; 1.03M foreign-born workers LOST employment...

Across the middle in large bold white serif type is the text 'AMERICANS FIRST'. Below is a white rounded-rectangle card formatted as an embedded X post from 'Rapid Response 47' (@RapidResponse47, with a blue verified check and small profile logo). The quoted post text reads: 'Since President Trump took office (Jan.-Sep. 2025): 2,57M native-born Americans GAINED employment; 1.03M foreign-born workers LOST employment. 2.64M native-born Americans JOINED the labor force; 1.23M foreign-born workers LEFT the labor force.' A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom.

notable_text: Prioritizing AMERICANS! | The Washington Post: The Trump administration said it will launch investigations into employers who take advantage of the H-1B visa program... to prioritize Americans over foreign-born workers in the labor market.
description: A U.S. Department of Labor graphic with a near-black background. The top half is a photograph of President Donald Trump standing at an outdoor lectern (with a green colonnade and an American flag behind him), holding up an open leather-bound document so the camera faces a signature on the right-hand page. Overlaid across the middle in white serif type (italic and bold) is the text 'Prioritizing AMERICANS!'. Below sits a white rounded rectangle card carrying 'The Washington Post' masthead in its blackletter logo font, then two paragraphs of black body text reading: 'The Trump administration said it will launch investigations into employers who take advantage of the H-1B visa program for highly skilled workers by hiring low-skilled foreign labor to cut costs.' and 'The U.S. Labor Department said it would begin opening investigations of employers that "abuse" the H-1B visa program, as part of a broader effort to prioritize Americans over foreign-born workers in the labor market.'

notable_text: One Year of AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!; President Trump has delivered:; 200 H-1B FRAUD AND ABUSE INVESTIGATIONS; $259 MILLION IN BACK-WAGES RECOVERED; 2,644 NEW APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS

Below, white text reads 'One Year of' (italic serif) over a large bold all-caps 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!', followed by an italic subhead in a small box: 'President Trump has delivered:'. Left column: NO TAX ON TIPS; SOCIAL SECURITY TAX CUTS; NO TAX ON OVERTIME; $259 MILLION IN BACK-WAGES RECOVERED; PELL GRANTS FOR SKILLED TRADES; LOWER COMPLIANCE COSTS FOR BUSINESSES; PROTECTION OF AMERICAN JOBS. notable_text: Number of law enforcement officers needed to arrest a criminal alien: UNCOOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS 8 to 10 / COOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS 2 / ICE.gov/detainers

The top headline in white reads 'Number of law enforcement officers needed to arrest a criminal alien:'. Two labeled banner tabs split the layout: a red banner 'UNCOOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS' above a large white '8 to 10', and a blue banner 'COOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS' above a large white '2', separated by a vertical divider. Body text on the left reads 'ICE needs more officers to help protect the public from unpredictable behavior by an at-large criminal attempting to evade justice.' The bottom-left shows the DHS seal with 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' and the bottom-right shows the URL 'ICE.gov/detainers.'

notable_text: FREE TICKET HOME; $1,000 to Self-Deport; There is no excuse to not self deport.; Visit DHS.gov/CBPHome

The U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal sits centered at the very top. In large bold navy condensed text the ticket reads 'FREE TICKET HOME'. Below, on a dark textured navy background, yellow bold text states '$1,000 to Self-Deport', followed by white text: 'Non-criminal illegal aliens can access travel assistance on their own terms to avoid arrest and earn a stipend for returning home.' and bold 'There is no excuse to not self deport.' A red rounded pill button at the bottom reads 'Visit DHS.gov/CBPHome'.

notable_text: 2025 Policy Wins - Economy; largest tax cut in American history; 100% of all net job creation going to American-born citizens; over $235 billion in tariff duties since January 2025

A large rounded off-white card fills most of the frame, headed by the bold dark-navy word 'Economy'. Below are five bulleted lines in dark text, with two phrases highlighted in yellow: 'Congress passed the Working Families Tax Cut, delivering the largest tax cut in American history, increasing Americans' take-home pay by as much as $13,300, and terminating benefits for at least 1.4 million illegal immigrants who were gaming the system.'; '687,000 private sector jobs were added, with 100% of all net job creation going to American-born citizens.'; 'Nominal private sector weekly earnings are on track to rise 4.2% in President Trump's first year.'; 'President Trump has secured tens of trillions in private and foreign investment.'; 'The U.S. Treasury has taken in over $235 billion in tariff duties since January 2025.' The phrases 'largest tax cut in American history' and 'American-born citizens' are highlighted in yellow.

notable_text: Leave on your OWN terms. Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation

notable_text: FOX NEWS; Mullin rips Spanberger for 'criminalizing' DHS while ICE arrests illegal alien felon in her 'sanctuary' state

notable_text: Green cards and visas are a privilege, not a right.

notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST! / Project Firewall / prioritize qualified Americans over foreign workers
